title: Best Project Management Software for Marketing Teams in 2026
description: A guide to choosing and using project management software tailored to marketing workflows, campaign planning, and cross-functional collaboration.
body:
Marketing teams have distinct project management needs that general-purpose tools often fail to address. Managing content calendars, campaign timelines, creative reviews, and cross-departmental dependencies requires features that support visual planning, stakeholder approvals, and handoffs between creative, editorial, and distribution teams.

## Key Requirements for Marketing PM

Marketing project management tools should support content calendar views for planning and scheduling campaigns and publications. Workflow automation for content review and approval processes reduces bottlenecks in creative production. Integration with marketing tools including CMS platforms, email marketing software, and social media schedulers ensures seamless handoffs. Resource management helps balance workload across design, copywriting, and campaign management teams.

## Top Platforms for Marketing Teams

**Asana** is a strong choice for marketing teams due to its timeline and portfolio views. Marketing teams use Asana to plan campaigns at the portfolio level while managing individual tasks and deadlines. Its custom fields allow teams to track content status, channel assignments, and approval stages. Asana's free tier provides core task management and collaboration features, with paid tiers adding timeline, goals, and advanced reporting.

**Monday.com** offers visual boards that adapt well to marketing campaign tracking. Its color-coded status columns, timeline views, and integration with tools like Canva, Mailchimp, and Google Drive make it suitable for creative teams. Monday.com's free tier supports up to 2 seats for small marketing teams.

**ClickUp** provides extensive customization that allows marketing teams to build workflows matching their exact processes. Its document collaboration features support creative briefs and content planning in the same workspace as task management. ClickUp's free tier offers a broad set of views and features for teams evaluating the platform.

## Marketing-Specific Features to Look For

When evaluating PM tools for marketing, prioritize platforms that offer content calendar views, guest access for external contributors like freelancers and agencies, approval workflows for content review cycles, and integration with your existing marketing technology stack. The right platform should reduce context switching by connecting campaign planning with execution tracking in a single workspace.

## Building Your Marketing PM Stack

Many marketing teams operate with multiple tools that handle different parts of the workflow. The PM platform should serve as the central hub, connecting to your CMS for content status, your email platform for campaign scheduling, and your analytics tools for performance tracking. Focus on integrations that eliminate manual status updates and data transfer between systems.
author: PilotStack Team
